configuration: qwen2.5:7b local (ollama blob 845dbda0ea48); chunked wrapper chunk_chars=900 overlap=120 top_k=8; depth 50; 2 haystacks; metric contains

accuracy.runner: benchmarks/external-benchmarks/NoLiMa/run_mase_chunked.py (no candidate injection; chunk -> ingest -> retrieve -> answer; model never sees more than the retrieved chunks)

baseline.configuration: true naked full-context: official task_template with the whole haystack, ollama num_ctx=32768, no retrieval, no candidates (scripts/run_nolima_naked_baseline.py)
baseline.structural_note: NoLiMa-32k is 32768 cl100k tokens ~= 36-40k qwen tokens, exceeding qwen2.5:7b's 32768 native window; every case carried a truncation flag (prompt_eval_count 16386), the depth-50 needle falls outside the evaluated window. Naked failure is structural, not incidental.

integrity_forensics_2026_07_07.april_naked_1_79pct: measurement artifact of the pre-2026-04-28 runner: haystack passed through the MASE executor at num_ctx 8192, needle truncated away; directionally correct (naked fails) but mechanism harsher than a fair window
integrity_forensics_2026_07_07.assisted_runner_since_2026_04_28: commit 9611adf1 added haystack-wide candidate-entity extraction + evidence preamble to run_mase_official.py; runs through that path (e.g. 2026-07-07 56/56) are DIAGNOSTIC ONLY and must not be published as naked baselines
integrity_forensics_2026_07_07.chunked_runner_vcs_gap: run_mase_chunked.py lived outside version control (mtime 2026-05-02) until 2026-07-07; brought under git the same day. April 60.71% vs today's 96.43% delta attributed to v0.5->v0.16 retrieval evolution (benchmark_notetaker/fact_sheet/mode_selector diffs) plus possible May model-blob update; per-parameter protocol continuity was verified against the April run's recorded summary

tier_semantics_disclosure.onlydirect_is_literal_tier: ONLYDirect questions share verbatim phrasing with the needle (e.g. needle 'Actually, {CHAR} lives next to {1}.' vs question 'Which character lives next to {1}?'); keyword retrieval is expected to excel here. This claim measures window-boundedness bypass, NOT latent associative reasoning.
tier_semantics_disclosure.non_literal_tiers: NoLiMa's signature no-literal-match tiers (needle_set onehop/twohop, needle_set_hard) remain 0% for MASE's keyword-based recall at every tested length (2026-04-19 committed runs: nolima_hard 0/20 @8k, nolima_hard_reasoning 0/20 @16k, E:/MASE-runs/results/external/phase_a_summary.jsonl) — consistent with all vector-free keyword systems; disclosed in docs/NOLIMA_3WAY.md.
tier_semantics_disclosure.future_lever: opt-in semantic candidate discovery (bge-m3) targets exactly this gap but has no NoLiMa-side evidence yet; any such run must be a separately labeled lane.

notes: Headline reading: on the LITERAL (ONLYDirect) tier, the task exceeds the model's native window; naked 0.0%, MASE chunked 96.43% while never showing the model more than the retrieved chunks.
April legacy claim (34/56 = 60.71% vs naked 1.79%) retained in git history for provenance; superseded by this refresh.
